% This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Description

Returns true if the first argument (a date_range) contains the second argument. Inverse of [RANGE_WITHIN](#esql-range_within); equivalent to `RANGE_WITHIN(b, a)`. Supports (date_range, date) and (date_range, date_range). The first argument must be a date_range.
